content.en:
Ye Tian really had an unimaginable desire for the Dao Codex of the Supreme Sword Dao Dao Ancestor, so even if he knew that there was a certain danger this time, he still had to go.

Of course, he also has full confidence in his own strength, as long as the Invincible True Ancestor doesn't make a move, he shouldn't be in any big danger.

And whether the Zixia Sect has an invincible true ancestor or not, it is difficult to say at present.

Ye Tian had already promised Ouyang Jiu'er to take the resources in the secret realm, but he wouldn't kill him directly, how stupid it was!

Although Ye Tian was able to fight against those five top True Ancestors and thirty ordinary True Ancestors with his own strength, if he could enter silently, it would naturally be better to enter silently.

"Ouyang Jiu'er, let's arrest an ordinary true monarch of the Zixia Sect first, and interrogate about the situation of that secret realm, how about it?"

Ye Tian proposed.

"Yes!"

Ouyang Jiu'er nodded.

Subsequently, Ye Tian used his copying talent to probe the surroundings and quickly locked on a true monarch.

......

Siyuan True Monarch is a top True Monarch of the Zixia Sect, and his strength is quite good.

He was originally a native of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and being valued by the Zixia Sect and joining the Zixia Sect was enough to show that he was a genius, and he was also a top genius among the geniuses, with great potential in the future.

Of course, in the headquarters of the Zixia Sect, he was definitely not a big person, after all, there were a large number of true ancestors there.

Moreover, Zhenjun was not qualified to enter the headquarters of the Zixia Sect.

Therefore, he was sent to this branch, and now in this branch, it is also a small high-level, the true ancestors usually retreat and cultivate, and rarely manage trivial matters, and the big and small affairs of this branch are basically managed by a group of top true monarchs.

Originally, he was cultivating in the branch.

But suddenly, a Supreme True Ancestor asked many True Ancestors and a large number of True Monarchs to patrol and look for outsiders, which made him a little unhappy.

But with the order of the Supreme True Ancestor, even if he was unwilling, he could only honestly come out to patrol and investigate.

"I hope to find the enemy as soon as possible, and then go back to cultivating!"

Siyuan Zhenjun muttered.

Suddenly.

Two figures appeared in front of him, and Siyuan Zhenjun was about to confirm it, but he lost consciousness.

Ye Tian looked at Siyuan Zhenjun in front of him, who was controlled by his illusionary powers, and immediately began to interrogate.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian already knew a lot about the branch of the Zixia Sect.

There is a total of one Supreme True Ancestor, hundreds of top True Ancestors, thousands of elite True Ancestors, and thousands of ordinary True Ancestors stationed here.

A five-heaven force like the Liuli Sect could only come up with dozens of top true ancestors, while a single branch of the Zixia Sect had hundreds of top true ancestors stationed.

From this, it can be seen how powerful the Upper Triple Heaven forces are, far surpassing those Middle Triple Heaven forces.

As for the information and intelligence of that secret realm, Ye Tian also asked about it.

Zixia Sect did discover that secret realm, and sent people to guard the secret realm, with the level of understanding of this true monarch, the secret realm resources seem to have been emptied, but a treasure was found, which made the true ancestors very interested, and it could improve the strength of the true ancestors.

But the secret realm is only opened once in a while, and that secret treasure only allows a small number of people to participate in enlightenment, so a group of true ancestors are inside to comprehend, and a group of true ancestors are guarding outside.

Wait for the next opening, and the two batches of True Ancestor reincarnation will be replaced.

Occasionally, a true monarch who has made great contributions or performed well will also be given the opportunity to enter that secret realm.

After the interrogation, Ye Tian cast an endless sinking on this True Monarch, and then threw it into the void crack, where it would float, he couldn't care.

"Jiu'er, what kind of treasure is there in that secret realm that can enhance the strength of the True Ancestor?Now there are at least ten top True Ancestors inside and outside there, as well as many more elite True Ancestors and ordinary True Ancestors. Ye Tian asked.

"It seems to be a useless Demon Suppression Stone, it is the foundation of the secret realm, it can only quench the power of the True Ancestor, so that the power of the True Ancestor becomes more refined, but it is only useful for the True Ancestor whose foundation is not strong, like those True Ancestors with a strong foundation, their True Ancestor Power is already extremely pure, and there is no way to use the Demon Suppression Stone to quench the power of the True Ancestor!

Ouyang Jiu'er explained.

Ye Tian was speechless, such a treasure is very precious to a force, is it good, I didn't expect it to be garbage in the eyes of the half-step domain ancestor, the key is that he is not easy to refute.

Moreover, it was precisely because of the Demon Suppression Stone that so many True Ancestors guarded this secret realm, otherwise he would have easily entered the secret realm.

"Jiu'er, to be honest, how long will you be able to take away the resources?"

Ye Tian asked solemnly.

"About ten minutes!"

Ouyang Jiu'er calculated and said.

"Okay, let's go straight in, at present, these True Ancestors will not leave, and it is impossible to sneak in. "

Ye Tian planned.

"You're okay alone, right?" Ouyang Jiu'er said worriedly.

She wasn't worried about Ye Tian, but worried about herself, if Ye Tian couldn't stand it, she would be finished.

"No problem! According to the intelligence, there is only one Supreme True Ancestor in this branch, and there is no Supreme True Ancestor in this secret realm, so I can definitely take you to take the resources." It's just that don't drop the chain on your side, once you delay for a long time and attract the strongest true ancestor of the Zixia Sect, it will be difficult for me to get out!" Ye Tian said.

"No problem, as long as you can withstand it, that's fine!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

The secret realm is opened every few years, but Ouyang Jiu'er has a secret technique to open, so there is no need to wait.

Immediately, Ye Tian took Ouyang Jiu'er to that secret realm.

Along the way, Ye Tian protected Ouyang Jiu'er's hidden aura, as long as the true ancestors did not investigate carefully, it was not easy to be exposed.

In front of the entrance to the secret realm.

Palaces are suspended here, and a true ancestor has retreated here, and has already used this place as a stronghold.

"Get ready!"

Ye Tian admonished.

After Ouyang Jiu'er said that she was ready, Ye Tian took her to the entrance of the secret realm.

At this time, Ouyang Jiu'er played a set of seals, echoing with the Secret Realm Great Array.

Bang!!!!

The entrance to the secret realm has opened.

And at this time, those true ancestors of the Zixia Sect naturally reacted.

"Enter!"

Ye Tian took Ouyang Jiu'er and entered the secret realm at once.

"Someone enters the secret realm, they have a way to open the secret realm, catch them!"

All the True Ancestors entered the secret realm, vowing to capture Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er.

-----------------

Secret territory.

Ye Tian shuttled quickly, but his whereabouts had been exposed, not only the True Ancestors outside had killed in, but the True Ancestors who were cultivating inside had also come out of the Demon Suppression Stone and stopped Ye Tian from coming.

"Brother Ye, hurry up, the resources outside the secret realm are gone, and there is only a mysterious space and treasures left in the magic stone of the secret realm town, which is a place that no one can imagine. "

Ouyang Jiu'er shouted.

"Inside the Demon Stone, you are a pit!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but scold.

After scolding, seeing that Ouyang Jiu'er was not angry, he immediately breathed a sigh of relief, for fear that this half-step domain ancestor would be angry.

But fortunately, this half-step domain ancestor named Ouyang Jiu'er is very young-hearted, unlike those strong people who generally do not allow anyone to provoke, kill people at every turn, and suppress them at the least.

Otherwise, no matter how annoyed Ye Tian was, he wouldn't dare to scold Ouyang Jiu'er.

But now he is really angry, the treasure is in the Demon Suppression Stone, and Ouyang Jiu'er had told him that the Demon Suppression Stone was rubbish.

If he dares to love him, he must go to the Demon Suppression Stone, that is, he must fight with those True Ancestors.

Why didn't you say it before that?

"Why didn't you say before that there were the resources you needed inside the Demon Suppression Stone?" Ye Tian asked.

"You didn't ask?" Ouyang Jiu'er looked like he took it for granted, and said, "Besides, it's not the same whether you say it or not, anyway, you still have to come in, and you still have to fight with those true ancestors." I'm not afraid of a true monarch, what are you afraid of. "

"I'm not afraid, just the top true ancestor, I don't pay attention to it yet, I'm angry that you don't have clear information, sometimes the information is not clear at all, and the result is different!

"It's gone!"

Ouyang Jiu'er shook his head.

Ye Tian didn't bother to continue asking, and took Ouyang Jiu'er to speed up and shuttle towards the Demon Suppression Stone.

Soon......

He had encountered the True Ancestors of the Inner Realm of the Secret Realm.

Unlike the expected number, there were more than forty True Ancestors inside, including seven top-level True Ancestors.

Boom!!!

More than forty True Ancestors came together to use their Origin Divine Powers or entry-level Dao Techniques to attack.

In the face of such an attack, ordinary top True Ancestors can't withstand it, I'm afraid that only the top True Ancestors can withstand it, and they will be injured.

And Ye Tian is naturally not afraid, he is the strongest true ancestor!

"Purple Gold True Body!"

The limit-level defensive Dao technique easily resisted the combined blows of many True Ancestors.

Immediately, Ye Tian performed the Attack Dao Technique-Ten Heavenly Hell Dragon!

Rumble!!!!

Ten terrifying Prison Dragons appeared and slew at those True Ancestors.

I saw that the ten True Ancestors couldn't dodge, and they were directly torn apart and shattered.

Then, Ye Tian performed another Dao technique, Blue Shadow Absolute Ice, and the three top true ancestors and more than twenty true ancestors were directly frozen, except for the three top true ancestors, those ordinary true ancestors and elite true ancestors all fell.

The three extreme level Dao techniques in a row surprised Ouyang Jiu'er on the side.

"It's not easy for him to cultivate the three Dao techniques to the extreme level!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said secretly in his heart.
